title.en: Or is it still making slow progress and becomin...

content.en:
Ye Tian went out of the customs and attracted the attention of many people in the Void Heaven Palace.

Because Ye Tian broke through to the half-step True Spirit Realm, this is a big deal!

Originally, in this era of great universe prosperity, with countless resources and a very good cultivation environment, many Heavenly Monarchs have stepped into the True Monarch realm, but the Ten Thousand Law Daozi, whose strength has improved extremely fast before, has been staying at the Heavenly Monarch level, which makes many people puzzled, and even many people think that Ye Tian's potential has been exhausted.

But now, Ye Tian has broken through and achieved the half-step True Spirit Realm, does it mean that Ye Tian is about to step into a new peak?

Or is it still making slow progress and becoming an ordinary genius!

Of course.

Knowledgeable people don't really think that Ye Tiannai is an ordinary genius, who can be promoted by the strength of a nine-star peak god general, and is a detached person, can he be an ordinary genius?

Even among the Dao Ancestors, they are definitely the top existences.

Only those who have short-sighted knowledge will look down on Ye Tian, and even feel that Ye Tian has fallen.

However, even those who had insight still underestimated Ye Tian.

......

Demon Sound Sect, Spirit Blue Domain Branch.

This is also an important branch of the Demon Sound Sect, with a True Monarch, three half-step True Spirits, and dozens of Heavenly Monarchs in charge, as well as a large number of Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs from the Spirit Blue Domain.

The Demon Sound Sect cultivates these junior geniuses, continuously sends genius personnel to the headquarters, strengthens the strength of the Demon Sound Sect, and also manages the huge territory of the Demon Sound Sect.

Compared with hundreds of millions of years ago, the strength of the Demon Sound Sect can be increased many times now, with dozens of True Monarchs, close to 10,000 Heavenly Monarchs, and a large number of god-level geniuses.

If it were given a few hundred million more years, the Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect might be able to rise to as many as 100,000.

Because the prosperous era has just begun, every top power is rapidly improving.

At this time, a figure appeared outside the Demon Sound Sect's Spirit Blue Domain Branch, it was Ye Tian.

"The development of the Demon Sound Sect is good!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Compared with hundreds of millions of years ago, the Demon Sound Sect is indeed much stronger, if hundreds of millions of years ago, when he broke into the Ten Star Sea, the Demon Sound Sect had such a scale, he would definitely die at that time.

However, the Demon Sound Sect is not what it used to be, and so is he.

"Let's take the Demon Sound Sect to test its strength, and we can avenge the day!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

If the Demon Yin Sect heard Ye Tian's words, it would definitely vomit blood.

After all, it was the Demon Sound Sect that suffered heavy losses that day, and the Void Heaven Hall and Ye Tianke all made a lot of money.

If it weren't for Ye Tian leaking the secrets of the Ten Star Seas, the Demon Sound Sect would probably use those Star Crystals to continuously increase its own strength, then today's Demon Sound Sect would definitely be the number one force in the Great Universe, and no force could match them.

Therefore, the Demon Yin Sect hated Ye Tian even more, and he couldn't wait to kill Ye Tian.

However, in the past hundreds of millions of years, Ye Tian has been in retreat and cultivating, and they can't find a chance, plus the power is developing too fast, and they need personnel to guard it, so they don't have time to find trouble with Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's momentum erupted partially, covering the entire Demon Sound Sect Spirit Blue Domain Branch.

The next moment, a Heavenly Monarch and a half-step True Spirit appeared, led by a True Monarch of this branch and an acquaintance of Ye Tian.

Phantom Sound Princess!

"Wanfa Daozi, it's you!"

Phantom Sound Zhenjun gritted his teeth and stared at Ye Tian, the anger and murderous intent in his eyes were not concealed at all.

"Yes, it's me!" Ye Tian said coldly: "Hundreds of millions of years ago, your Demon Sound Sect surrounded and killed me, this revenge, I haven't forgotten!"

"Wanfa Daozi, you still have the face to say this, if you hadn't leaked the Xingchen Crystal and Xingchen Dzi at that time, the strength of our Demon Yin Sect would probably be ten times stronger now. For hundreds of millions of years, we haven't found a chance to take revenge, but I didn't expect you to come here today!Hahaha, Wanfa Daozi, hundreds of millions of years have passed, and you have only just been promoted to a half-step True Spirit, and I am already a True Monarch, and even at the True Monarch level, I have made a small progress, and I am about to reach the peak of the early stage of the True Spirit Realm, and it is easy to kill you!"

Phantom Sound is full of confidence.

Of course, he also knew that Ye Tian's strength was terrifying, and the other Heavenly Monarchs and Half-Step True Spirits couldn't help Ye Tian, so he made a move on Ye Tian alone.

"Tenyin Kaba!"

A terrifying Chaos Divine Power was unleashed by the Phantom Sound True Monarch, this is a powerful Divine Power that is located in the hundreds of places on the Chaos Divine Power List, and the Phantom Sound True Monarch uses the True Monarch cultivation to unleash it, how terrifying its power is.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The void shook, covering the void around Ye Tian.

Under such an attack, it would be difficult for any half-step true spirit to save his life, and the Tianyin Jiaye Divine Power could shatter a person's body, leaving no trace, and even the Chaos Arcana could shatter it.

Moreover, it almost ignored defenses, and it was difficult for a true monarch who was not strong in flesh to block this move.

However, Ye Tian stood there, allowing the Heavenly Ye Jiaye Divine Power to shake his body, and he was unmoved, and even had a smile on his face, and he was not hurt at all.

"No way, how can you be okay?"

Phantom Sound True Monarch was shocked.

Next, Phantom Sound True Monarch once again used a door-door method, but he didn't help Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian spoke: "Because you are too weak, I thought that in these hundreds of millions of years, you will have some big changes, but I didn't expect that just the cultivation has been improved, and other aspects are still so rubbish!"

"Next, I'll use a move, if you can stop it, you can live!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he spat out two words-

"Destroy the gods!"

Airplanes!

A terrifying wave swept across the entire Demon Sound Sect Spirit Blue Domain Branch's Celestial Monarch, Half-Step True Spirit, and Phantom Sound True Monarch.

He actually attacked so many people at the same time, but most of the attacks fell on the Phantom Sound True Monarch, and some of the other aftermaths affected these half-step True Spirits and the Heavenly Monarch.

But what Ye Tian used was not an ordinary means, but the Origin Divine Power-Destroying God, it was the Soul Origin Divine Power, and the power was so terrifying.

"Soul Origin ......"

Phantom Sound True Monarch's pupils shrank sharply, and before he could speak, his entire soul was shattered.

The gap between him and Ye Tian is too big, even if he is a true monarch, he is far inferior to Ye Tian in the half-step True Spirit Realm, and he can't stop Ye Tian's God Destruction at all.

As for the other half-step True Spirits and Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Yin Sect Branch, they were even more like ants in Ye Tian's eyes.

I saw a Famous Heavenly Monarch and a Half-Step True Monarch maintaining their figures, motionless, their eyes dim, and they were all annihilated and completely dead.

In the blink of an eye, the Demon Sound Sect's Spirit Blue Domain Division turned into a dead domain.

"Go to the next branch of the Demon Sound Sect!"

Ye Tian's voice was still echoing in this branch, but the person had disappeared.

With the passage of time, one of the branches of the Demon Sound Sect was destroyed, and a large number of half-step True Spirits and Heavenly Monarchs died, not to mention, many True Monarchs died, which was a huge loss for the Demon Sound Sect!

How powerful is the true monarch, in the midst of chaos, it is also a small overlord, a real big man, in charge of a chaotic continent of life and death.

But now, these true monarchs have fallen one by one.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, our Demon Sound Sect will never die with you!"

Baili Zhenjun roared angrily at the headquarters of the Demon Sound Sect.
